output: Implemented batch 3 task T3 in `TimelineEditor.tsx` and checkpointed the result in `.megaplan/.../execution_batch_3.json`. The editor now wires `useFinalVideoAvailable`, derives `finalVideoShotIds`, passes the new final-video props into `TimelineCanvas`, and adds `handleSwitchToFinalVideo` to register the final video asset, replace the shot-group clips with one video clip spanning the same time range, and persist the change through a single `applyEdit({ type: 'rows', ... })` mutation.
commands_run: rg -n "export function getNextClipId|export const getNextClipId|function getNextClipId|type AssetRegistryEntry|interface AssetRegistryEntry|export type AssetRegistryEntry" src/tools/video-editor/lib/timeline-data.ts src/tools/video-editor/types.ts src/tools/video-editor/types/index.ts src/tools/video-editor -g '!**/*.test.*'
rg -n "export type TimelineRegisterAsset|type TimelineRegisterAsset|interface TimelineRegisterAsset" src/tools/video-editor/hooks src/tools/video-editor -g '!**/*.test.*'

rg -n "export function buildTrackClipOrder|const buildTrackClipOrder|function buildTrackClipOrder|updateClipOrder" src/tools/video-editor/lib/coordinate-utils.ts src/tools/video-editor -g '!**/*.test.*'

task_updates.executor_notes: Wired `useFinalVideoAvailable()` into `TimelineEditor`, derived `finalVideoShotIds` from `finalVideoMap` minus dismissed shots, and added `handleSwitchToFinalVideo` using direct asset registration plus a single `applyEdit({ type: 'rows', ... })` mutation. Verified the switch path uses `generateUUID()` for the asset key, imports and uses `getNextClipId()`, creates an `AssetRegistryEntry` with `type: 'video/mp4'`, and passes `metaDeletes: clipIds` while replacing the shot-group clips with one final-video action on the same row.
commands_run: rg -n "export function getNextClipId|export const getNextClipId|function getNextClipId|type AssetRegistryEntry|interface AssetRegistryEntry|export type AssetRegistryEntry" src/tools/video-editor/lib/timeline-data.ts src/tools/video-editor/types.ts src/tools/video-editor/types/index.ts src/tools/video-editor -g '!**/*.test.*'
rg -n "export type TimelineRegisterAsset|type TimelineRegisterAsset|interface TimelineRegisterAsset" src/tools/video-editor/hooks src/tools/video-editor -g '!**/*.test.*'

rg -n "export function buildTrackClipOrder|const buildTrackClipOrder|function buildTrackClipOrder|updateClipOrder" src/tools/video-editor/lib/coordinate-utils.ts src/tools/video-editor -g '!**/*.test.*'

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified `handleSwitchToFinalVideo` uses `generateUUID()` for `assetKey`, imports and uses `getNextClipId()`, creates `AssetRegistryEntry` with `type: 'video/mp4'`, and calls `applyEdit({ type: 'rows', ... metaDeletes: clipIds, ... })` for the replacement.
